title: pseudocedrela kotschyi
intro: Pseudocedrela kotschyi, also known as African mahogany, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pseudocedrela kotschyi include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a remedy for digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the tree are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that are used to treat various health conditions.
